text.title: spatial-accessibility Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for spatial-accessibility as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding focus highlight animations for accessibility without checking for flicker/strobe risk.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: More than 3 flashes per second can trigger photosensitive seizures. All animated focus highlights must be checked against the 3-flash threshold.
